payload.label: coffee maker
payload.long_description: Compact black glossy single-serve coffee maker with a chrome-accented lid and a translucent blue water-reservoir panel visible on the front; sits on a small drip tray, mostly visible but slightly cropped at the image edges, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"coffee maker","short_description":"black glossy single-serve coffee maker","long_description":"Compact black glossy single-serve coffee maker with a chrome-accented lid and a translucent blue water-reservoir panel visible on the front; sits on a small drip tray, mostly visible but slightly cropped at the image edges, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.","attributes":["black glossy plastic","single-serve design","chrome lid accent","translucent blue water reservoir panel","drip tray with ridges","compact countertop appliance","slightly edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.7}
